scripts.supabase:reset: cd docker && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: for file in supabase/migrations/*.sql; do docker exec -i town-meeting-db psql -U postgres -d postgres < "$file"; done
scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i town-meeting-db psql -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: pnpm supabase:reset && sleep 5 && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
